capabilities.compact-contracts: Deploy and call Compact smart contracts.
capabilities.shielded-state: Use private state and zero-knowledge witnesses.
capabilities.unshielded-state: Read and write public contract ledger state.
capabilities.native-tokens: Use the network's native token and DUST transaction-fee model.
capabilities.contract-to-contract: Call another contract atomically from a Compact circuit.
capabilities.zkir-v3: Compile and prove circuits using the ZKIR v3 backend.
capabilities.keccak256: Use native Keccak hashing inside Compact circuits.
capabilities.secp256k1: Use native secp256k1 operations inside Compact circuits.
capabilities.ecdsa-accounts: Use the ledger's ECDSA account/signature support.
